title: Gibsons Tanker Market Report
summary:
Economic Headwinds
In early April, the OPEC+ coalition made a surprise decision to implement fresh production cuts, with concerns over the global economy and banking crisis being cited as one of the reasons behind the cut. Oil prices rallied as a result but in more recent weeks these gains have been erased. On the global economic front, there indeed have been some troubling indications, most notably in OECD countries.
